Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the package.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1011  
Pattern: ^\S+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DomainName.description: The name of the domain that contains the repository that contains the package.
DomainName.markdownDescription:
The name of the domain that contains the repository that contains the package.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 2  
Maximum Length: 50  
Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9\-]{0,48}[a-z0-9]$  
Update requires: Replacement

Repository.description: The name of the repository that contains the package.
Repository.markdownDescription:
The name of the repository that contains the package.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 2  
Maximum Length: 100  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._\-]{1,99}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Format.markdownDescription:
The format of the package.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: npm | pypi | maven | nuget | generic | ruby | swift | cargo  
Update requires: Replacement

Namespace.markdownDescription:
The namespace of the package.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[^#/\s]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the package.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[^#/\s]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

OriginConfiguration.description: The package origin configuration for the package.

Restrictions.description: The origin restrictions for the package.

Publish.description: The package origin configuration that determines if new versions of the package can be published directly to the repository.
Publish.markdownDescription:
The package origin configuration that determines if new versions of the package can be published directly to the repository.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ALLOW | BLOCK  
Update requires: No interruption

Upstream.description: The package origin configuration that determines if new versions of the package can be added to the repository from an external connection or upstream source.
Upstream.markdownDescription:

Required: No
